rules: Use Manrope for all headings (H1-H4) to provide a wide, confident, enterprise look.
Use IBM Plex Sans for body text and table data for maximum legibility of dense financial information.
Use IBM Plex Mono for all numerical financial data, account numbers, and currency values to ensure perfect vertical alignment.
Avoid 'Inter' and generic default fonts.
Headings should have tight letter spacing (tracking-tight).
Data tables must use text-sm for density.
Never use pure black or pure gray. Always tint grays.
Avoid AI-slop purple gradients; use crisp, distinct colors.
Ensure all text over backgrounds meets APCA contrast ratios.
Each nav section uses its specific assigned quiet icon color.

shadows: Use subtle, layered ambient shadows (e.g., shadow-sm for cards, shadow-md for hover states).
borders: Use 1px subtle borders (border-border) on all cards and table containers to provide a structured, crisp look.
Nested radii: inner elements should have a slightly smaller border-radius than their containers.
glassmorphism: Use sparingly for sticky headers or dropdowns (backdrop-blur-md bg-white/80 border-b border-gray-200).

component_name: Various custom components leveraging Shadcn UI

rules: Use high-density grid for data-heavy sections.
Use subgrid where necessary for aligning nested table components.
Maintain 24px (gap-6) between major dashboard widgets.

layouts.sidebar: w-64 flex-shrink-0 border-r bg-white transition-all duration-300 collapsible
layouts.header: h-16 border-b bg-white flex items-center justify-between px-6 shrink-0
layouts.ai_panel: w-80 flex-shrink-0 border-l bg-white transition-all duration-300 collapsible shadow-[-4px_0_24px_rgba(0,0,0,0.02)]
rules: Left sidebar and Right AI panel MUST be collapsible.
Top bar must contain the Multi-tenant company switcher.
Do NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns or floating menus.
Use micro-interactions for feedback.
NEVER use 'transition: all' globally in CSS.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion.
All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a data-testid attribute.
Ensure keyboard navigation works for sidebars and tables.
Color-coded AI confidence chips MUST also include text or icons (e.g., 'High Confidence', 'Needs Review').
Images should be functional. Avoid placeholder graphics.

3d_libraries.recommendation: Not required for core accounting dashboard, prioritize D3.js or Recharts/Shadcn charts for financial data visualization.

analytics_placeholder.description: Graphs of performance analytics on a laptop screen (use as subtle background for auth/onboarding if needed)

documents_placeholder.description: Calculator and accounting documents (can be used in marketing/empty states)

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the dashboard using React, Tailwind CSS, and Shadcn UI primitives.
Implement a three-role architecture (Superadmin, Pro, Client) with distinct views.
Include a multi-tenant switcher in the top navigation header.

Create a collapsible left navigation panel that includes nested Accounting groups (Transactions, Inventory, Assets, Loans, Tags, Reconciliation, Book Review, Close the Books, Year-End Close, Chart of Accounts, Journal Entries, General Ledger). DO NOT include Real Estate/Rental Properties.
Create a collapsible right-side AI assistant chat panel that is context-aware.
Build an AI onboarding wizard (multi-step: business type -> QBO link -> auto CoA -> Plaid bank link -> Veryfi statement upload -> categorization review).
Develop a dense, highly functional Transactions table with split, link, AI confidence chips, needs-review flags, and bulk actions.
Create realistic Report templates (Trial Balance, Balance Sheet, Income Statement, etc.) that have an Accrual/Cash toggle and 'Export PDF' button. Ensure they look like real CPA statements.
Use Manrope for headings and IBM Plex Sans/Mono for body/data.
Assign distinct pastel accent colors to left nav icons as defined in the colors section.
Ensure all features support manual add/edit.
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Avoid generic 'AI slop' aesthetics. Make the design crisp, enterprise-ready, and highly functional.
Do not use dark colors as gradients.
Do not center align the app container. Left-align data and text.
Create depth through layered design elements with explicit z-index hierarchy.
Use modern pill-shaped or slightly rounded crisp buttons with interaction animations.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters (like robot or brain) for icons. Use Phosphor or Lucide icons.
Prioritize using pre-existing Shadcn components, customizing their spacing and radii.
GENERAL UI UX DESIGN GUIDELINES: Design for data density. Financial software requires seeing many records at once. Reduce padding in table cells compared to standard SaaS apps.
Focus on hierarchy. The most critical number should be top-left.
Color is meaning. Do not use red/green for decoration. Reserve them strictly for financial loss/gain or system errors/success.
Include clear empty states with calls to action.
Every table should support scrolling, sorting, and bulk actions naturally.
The AI panel should feel like a functional utility (like a calculator or notebook), not a chatbot toy.
